text:
# Funding & Withdrawals

You fund your account by connecting a self-custodial wallet and depositing supported assets: BTC, ETH, USDT, and BNB.

Withdrawals are sent back to your connected wallet and typically settle within 24 hours. BlackQuant charges no withdrawal fees — you only pay the network gas fee. The minimum withdrawal is the equivalent of $10.

Because BlackQuant is non-custodial and keeps a small reserve buffer for open positions, the "Available to Withdraw" figure on the Treasury page can be lower than your "Total Balance".

If a withdrawal is stuck in "Pending" for more than 24 hours, open a ticket with human support from the Help Desk — the assistant can't access your account.

# Security, 2FA & Verification

BlackQuant is non-custodial: your private keys never leave your wallet, and the trading bot has execution permission only — it can place trades but can never move or withdraw your funds.

**Two-factor authentication (2FA):** enable it under Personal → 2FA. BlackQuant supports authenticator apps using time-based one-time passwords (TOTP), such as Google Authenticator or Authy. SMS 2FA is not supported.

**Verification:** completing identity verification under Personal → Verification raises your withdrawal limits and unlocks higher subscription tiers.

BlackQuant will never ask for your seed phrase, private key, or 2FA code. If anyone does, it is a scam — report it from the Help Desk.

# Signal Plans

BlackQuant offers three subscription tiers for automated trade signals:

- **Starter — $29/mo**: up to 10 signals/day, 1 active position, email alerts, basic analytics.
- **Growth — $79/mo**: up to 50 signals/day, 5 active positions, SMS & email alerts, advanced analytics, referral rewards.
- **Elite — $199/mo**: unlimited signals and positions, priority alert routing, full analytics suite, a dedicated account manager, and API access.

Choosing annual billing saves 20% versus monthly.

You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Downgrades take effect at the start of your next billing cycle; upgrades apply immediately and are prorated. A plan stays inactive until you fund your account.
